'''âm-p-l''' ('''kamapal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moodle|moodle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moodle|moodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| kamapal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimapal|thimapal]] || [[word:jimapal|jimapal]] || [[word:shimapal|shimapal]] || [[word:kimapal|kimapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumapal|thuthumapal]] || [[word:jujumapal|jujumapal]] || [[word:shushumapal|shushumapal]] || [[word:kukumapal|kukumapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumapal|thumapal]] || [[word:jumapal|jumapal]] || [[word:shumapal|shumapal]] || [[word:kumapal|kumapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumapal|thumapal]] || [[word:jumapal|jumapal]] || [[word:shumapal|shumapal]] || [[word:kumapal|kumapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themapal|themapal]] || [[word:jemapal|jemapal]] || [[word:shemapal|shemapal]] || [[word:kemapal|kemapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomapal|thothomapal]] || [[word:jojomapal|jojomapal]] || [[word:shoshomapal|shoshomapal]] || [[word:kokomapal|kokomapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomapal|thomapal]] || [[word:jomapal|jomapal]] || [[word:shomapal|shomapal]] || [[word:komapal|komapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomapal|thomapal]] || [[word:jomapal|jomapal]] || [[word:shomapal|shomapal]] || [[word:komapal|komapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmapal|thĂŠmapal]] || [[word:jĂŠmapal|jĂŠmapal]] || [[word:shĂŠmapal|shĂŠmapal]] || [[word:kĂŠmapal|kĂŠmapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamapal|thathamapal]] || [[word:jajamapal|jajamapal]] || [[word:shashamapal|shashamapal]] || [[word:kakamapal|kakamapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamapal|thamapal]] || [[word:jamapal|jamapal]] || [[word:shamapal|shamapal]] || [[word:kamapal|kamapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamapal|thamapal]] || [[word:jamapal|jamapal]] || [[word:shamapal|shamapal]] || [[word:kamapal|kamapal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamapal|shamapal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamapal|goshamapal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamapal|gokishamapal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamapalnĂŒ|shamapalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamapalnknĂŒ|goshamapalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapalnĂŒ|gokishamapalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamapalshĂ«|shamapalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamapalnkshĂ«|goshamapalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamapalshĂ«|gokishamapalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapalro|shamapalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapalnkro|goshamapalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapalro|gokishamapalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapalmu|shamapalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapalnkmu|goshamapalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapalmu|gokishamapalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamapalsher|shamapalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamapalnksher|goshamapalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamapalsher|gokishamapalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamapalng|shamapalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamapalnkng|goshamapalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamapalng|gokishamapalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamapalya|shamapalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamapalnkya|goshamapalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamapalya|gokishamapalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamapalyam|shamapalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamapalnkyam|goshamapalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamapalyam|gokishamapalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapalnĂŒshĂ«|shamapalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamapalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamapalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapalnĂŒro|shamapalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapalnknĂŒro|goshamapalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapalnĂŒro|gokishamapalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapalnĂŒmu|shamapalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapalnknĂŒmu|goshamapalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapalnĂŒmu|gokishamapalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapalshĂ«nĂŒ|shamapalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamapalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamapalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapalshĂ«ro|shamapalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapalnkshĂ«ro|goshamapalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapalshĂ«ro|gokishamapalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapalshĂ«mu|shamapalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapalnkshĂ«mu|goshamapalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapalshĂ«mu|gokishamapalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapalronĂŒ|shamapalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapalnkronĂŒ|goshamapalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapalronĂŒ|gokishamapalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapalroshĂ«|shamapalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapalnkroshĂ«|goshamapalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapalroshĂ«|gokishamapalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapalromu|shamapalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapalnkromu|goshamapalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapalromu|gokishamapalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapalmunĂŒ|shamapalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapalnkmunĂŒ|goshamapalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapalmunĂŒ|gokishamapalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapalmushĂ«|shamapalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapalnkmushĂ«|goshamapalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapalmushĂ«|gokishamapalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapalmuro|shamapalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapalnkmuro|goshamapalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapalmuro|gokishamapalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
